name: DreamCube
description: Modly model extension for DreamCube RGB-D cubemap, equirectangular panorama, mesh, and 3DGS scene generation from a front RGB image with optional internal Depth Anything V2 Small auto-depth.
author: DrHepa

hf_snapshot.note: setup.py records the model directory only; DreamCube weights are not downloaded by setup.

auto_depth.download_behavior: lazy runtime download by transformers cache when auto depth is first used

nodes.name: DreamCube Panorama
nodes.description: Generate an equirectangular RGB panorama PNG from a front RGB image, internal auto-depth or a supplied front depth image, and six directional prompts.

params_schema.label: Depth Mode
params_schema.tooltip: Auto generates front depth inside DreamCube with Depth Anything V2 Small. No separate modly-depth-anything extension is required.

params_schema.label: Auto Depth Variant
params_schema.tooltip: Internal DreamCube auto-depth model: depth-anything/Depth-Anything-V2-Small-hf. Weights are cached under .modly/auto-depth/cache when first used, not during setup.

params_schema.label: Front Depth Image (optional)
params_schema.tooltip: Optional front-view depth map. In auto mode DreamCube generates depth internally with Depth Anything V2 Small; this does not require the separate modly-depth-anything extension. If supplied in auto mode, this path wins.
params_schema.description: Optional override for internal DreamCube auto-depth.

params_schema.label: Save Generated Input Depth
params_schema.tooltip: Save the internally generated front depth sidecar as input_front_depth_auto.png in the DreamCube run folder.

params_schema.label: Front Prompt
params_schema.tooltip: Text prompt for the front view.

params_schema.label: Right Prompt
params_schema.tooltip: Text prompt for the right view.

params_schema.label: Back Prompt
params_schema.tooltip: Text prompt for the back view.

params_schema.label: Left Prompt
params_schema.tooltip: Text prompt for the left view.

params_schema.label: Top Prompt
params_schema.tooltip: Text prompt for the upward view.

params_schema.label: Bottom Prompt
params_schema.tooltip: Text prompt for the downward view.

params_schema.label: Inference Steps
params_schema.tooltip: DreamCube diffusion steps. Upstream default is 50.

params_schema.label: Guidance Scale
params_schema.tooltip: Classifier-free guidance strength. Upstream default is 7.5.

params_schema.label: Depth Normalize Scale
params_schema.tooltip: Depth normalization scale passed to DreamCube.

params_schema.label: Pano-to-3D Mode
params_schema.tooltip: Scene reconstruction mode used when sidecar scene outputs are requested or when using the scene node.

params_schema.label: Output Format
params_schema.tooltip: The panorama node returns the generated equirectangular RGB PNG.

params_schema.label: Max Equirectangular 3D Size
params_schema.tooltip: Maximum dimension for equirectangular RGB-D sidecar conversion. Use 0 for upstream native size.

params_schema.label: Max Cubemap 3D Size
params_schema.tooltip: Maximum cube face size for cubemap RGB-D sidecar conversion. Use 0 for upstream native size.

params_schema.label: Save All Outputs
params_schema.tooltip: Save cubemap/depth PNG sidecars in the run output folder.

params_schema.label: Seed
params_schema.tooltip: Seed passed as a torch.Generator to the DreamCube pipeline. Set -1 for pipeline default randomness.

nodes.name: DreamCube Scene
nodes.description: Generate a navigable 3D scene from a front RGB image, internal auto-depth or a supplied front depth image, and six directional prompts. Returns a scene manifest with a required GLB plus OBJ, 3DGS splat, and RGB-D PNG sidecars.

params_schema.label: Depth Mode
params_schema.tooltip: Auto generates front depth inside DreamCube with Depth Anything V2 Small. No separate modly-depth-anything extension is required.

params_schema.label: Auto Depth Variant
params_schema.tooltip: Internal DreamCube auto-depth model: depth-anything/Depth-Anything-V2-Small-hf. Weights are cached under .modly/auto-depth/cache when first used, not during setup.

params_schema.label: Front Depth Image (optional)
params_schema.tooltip: Optional front-view depth map. In auto mode DreamCube generates depth internally with Depth Anything V2 Small; this does not require the separate modly-depth-anything extension. If supplied in auto mode, this path wins.
params_schema.description: Optional override for internal DreamCube auto-depth.

params_schema.label: Save Generated Input Depth
params_schema.tooltip: Save the internally generated front depth sidecar as input_front_depth_auto.png in the DreamCube run folder.

params_schema.label: Front Prompt
params_schema.tooltip: Text prompt for the front view.

params_schema.label: Right Prompt
params_schema.tooltip: Text prompt for the right view.

params_schema.label: Back Prompt
params_schema.tooltip: Text prompt for the back view.

params_schema.label: Left Prompt
params_schema.tooltip: Text prompt for the left view.

params_schema.label: Top Prompt
params_schema.tooltip: Text prompt for the upward view.

params_schema.label: Bottom Prompt
params_schema.tooltip: Text prompt for the downward view.

params_schema.label: Inference Steps
params_schema.tooltip: DreamCube diffusion steps. Upstream default is 50.

params_schema.label: Guidance Scale
params_schema.tooltip: Classifier-free guidance strength. Upstream default is 7.5.

params_schema.label: Depth Normalize Scale
params_schema.tooltip: Depth normalization scale passed to DreamCube.

params_schema.label: Pano-to-3D Mode
params_schema.tooltip: Select whether OBJ and 3DGS sidecars are reconstructed from cubemap RGB-D or equirectangular RGB-D.

params_schema.label: Max Equirectangular 3D Size
params_schema.tooltip: Maximum dimension for equirectangular RGB-D to mesh/3DGS conversion. Use 0 for upstream native size.

params_schema.label: Max Cubemap 3D Size
params_schema.tooltip: Maximum cube face size for cubemap RGB-D to mesh/3DGS conversion. Use 0 for upstream native size.

params_schema.label: Mesh Depth Jump Removal Threshold
params_schema.tooltip: Remove mesh triangles whose relative depth jump exceeds this value. Set 0 to disable depth-jump removal; triangles touching repaired or invalid depth are always removed.

params_schema.label: Mesh Footprint Ratio Limit
params_schema.tooltip: Reject a triangle when any world-space edge exceeds this multiple of its angularly expected footprint at the nearer endpoint. Set 0 to disable this filter.

params_schema.label: Mesh Aspect Ratio Limit
params_schema.tooltip: Reject needle or sliver triangles whose normalized aspect ratio exceeds this value; 1 is equilateral. Set 0 to disable this filter.

params_schema.label: Save All Outputs
params_schema.tooltip: When enabled, save cubemap RGB/depth visualization sidecars in addition to required equirectangular PNG, OBJ, and 3DGS outputs.

params_schema.label: Seed
params_schema.tooltip: Seed passed as a torch.Generator to the DreamCube pipeline. Set -1 for pipeline default randomness.
